description_long: This object is a group of seven ornate swords, each with unique blade shapes and elaborate designs. The blades vary from straight double-edged to broad, cleaver-like forms, and some feature jagged or flared edges. The handles are distinct, with some wrapped in leather or cord, others adorned with metallic or jeweled pommels, and several featuring prominent crossguards with decorative motifs. The color palette includes metallic silvers and grays for the blades, with gold, bronze, blue, and brown accents on the handles and guards. The swords appear to be constructed primarily from metal, with some wooden or leather elements in the grips. These weapons are visually striking and would stand out as display pieces or fantasy props in an urban environment.
description: A group of seven highly detailed, ornate swords with varied blade shapes and decorative handles, featuring metallic and colored accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing all seven swords side by side, highlighting the diversity in blade shapes and handle designs.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thin profiles of the swords, emphasizing the blade thickness and handle contours.
description_view_2: Rear view of the swords, displaying the backs of the blades and the reverse side of the handles and guards.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slimness of the blades and the side profiles of the handles.
attribute_blade_type: varied; straight double-edged, broad cleaver, jagged, and flared
attribute_handle_design: varied; wrapped, contoured, metallic, jeweled pommels, decorative guards
attribute_ornamentation: decorative guards, colored accents, jeweled pommels
